title: TestList
description: Beck-style ordered test list at the feature level. Ordering drives design momentum.

ordered_for.description: Ordering rationale chosen by the Test Strategist.

id.description: Test item identifier within this list.

scenario_file.description: Relative path to the .feature or .test.ts file.

kind.description: behavior = an AC scenario (BDD/pytest-bdd for Python), exercised through the API boundary. fitness = an architectural fitness test: a structural constraint (layering contract, ORM-only, config-in-env) verified against the source, OR a data/runtime invariant (an NFR budget, or a declared persistence invariant like a unique/FK/CHECK constraint) verified against the REAL branch database (never a mock). A service-backed feature must have >=1 fitness item (checkFitnessCoverage), and every architecture.json persistence_invariant must be covered by a test-list item referencing its invariant_id (checkPersistenceCoverage); both hard-block Gate 3.

invariant_id.description: For a data/persistence fitness test: the id of the architecture.json persistence_invariant this test covers (e.g. "PI1-stock-sku-unique"). checkPersistenceCoverage requires every declared invariant to be referenced by >=1 item.
